title: Add flash-backed MeshCore compatibility settings persistence
description: Implement durable Zephyr settings/NVS persistence for MeshCore compatibility-local stores introduced by project-LICHEN-9c4y.21. This must cover reboot reload, clear/reset semantics, corruption/default handling, flash-backed validation, and must keep MeshCore compatibility state separate from native LICHEN identity, OSCORE/link/group/routing/radio state. No physical hardware is required for design/unit portions, but physical board flash validation should be chained separately if needed.
